title: Smoke test calls Get-ScanFiles/Get-ScansetDiskSize with wrong parameter names
description: Widget smoke tests (Invoke-WidgetSmokeTests.Tests.ps1 section 14) called Get-ScanFiles with -BasePath/-Prefix and Get-ScansetDiskSize with -Files, but the actual function signatures in Show-ScanDashboard.ps1 use -Def (hashtable) and -ReportPath (string). This parameter mismatch causes CommandNotFoundException-adjacent failures: the call binds to no valid parameter set, PowerShell throws a ParameterBindingException which manifests as a test failure indistinguishable from CommandNotFoundException in smoke test output.
detection_method: Manual code review of scan dashboard button handlers vs smoke test expectations

fix_applied.description: Updated smoke tests to use correct parameter signatures: Get-ScanFiles -Def $hashtable -ReportPath $path and Get-ScansetDiskSize -Def $hashtable -ReportPath $path. Added Extract-Timestamp test and ScanSetDefs existence validation test.
fix_applied.pattern: Match smoke test call signatures to actual function param blocks
